topic: Tim Sweeney's quiet conservation effort vs viral speculation on AI and time travelers
tweet1: The guy who built Fortnite has spent $200M buying 50,000 acres of North Carolina wilderness to block developers—while the timeline speculates Elon accidentally confirmed a time traveler's AI prediction.
tweet2: @awkwardgoogle reported Tim Sweeney's used permanent legal protections to stop logging on those forests. No press tour, no manifesto. Just land purchases and ironclad trusts. That's actual resource allocation.
tweet3: Meanwhile @HustleBitch_ pushed 400+ engagements on "Elon may have confirmed a time traveler" because he said AI might make work optional. One's buying dirt. The other's farming dopamine with sci-fi.
tweet4: Conservation doesn't trend because it's boring documentation work. Prediction: Sweeney will own 100k acres before most people hear his name outside gaming. The feeds reward fantasy over land deeds.
